product_updates.title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
product_updates.content: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising, decorating and creator-based opportunities.

product_updates.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
product_updates.content: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

product_updates.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
product_updates.content: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.

product_updates.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
product_updates.content: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.

product_updates.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
product_updates.content: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.

product_updates.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
product_updates.content: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

product_updates.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
product_updates.content: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: your stake in OpenAI, and the Treasury’s AI warning
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: The foundational elements of AI architecture that IT leaders need to scale
technical_breakthroughs.content: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases as the technology continues to grow. That constant evolution also introduces risk, leaving IT leaders to wonder which investments will prove valuable even six months into the fu…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Why worms (and microbes) are catching on as a manure pollution solution
technical_breakthroughs.content: Anthony Agueda, a third-generation California dairy farmer, pulls a rake through a bed of dark, wet wood chips on his family’s land in Hickman, a tiny town in the state’s agricultural heartland. He reaches down with both hands and pulls up a clump of muck, turning it over to reveal a half-dozen s…
